hero.description: Start your journey to study in India with a simple and guided application process. Our International Admissions Team supports you from enquiry to enrolment, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience.

stepsSection.title: Step-by-Step Application Guide
stepsSection.description: Applications to Presidency University are completed online through our admissions portal. Follow these simple steps to apply.

steps.title: Create Account
steps.description: Visit apply.presidencyuniversity.in and create your applicant account.

steps.title: Choose Programme
steps.description: Select your programme (UG, PG, Doctoral, or Diploma).

steps.title: Fill Application
steps.description: Complete the online form with your details.

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.description: Submit your application and await confirmation.

steps.title: Confirm Admission
steps.description: Accept your offer and secure your place.

documentsSection.title: Documents Required for International Applicants
documentsSection.description: Please prepare the following documents before beginning your application. All documents must be submitted in English or with a certified English translation.

documents.title: Completed Application Form
documents.description: Submit the fully completed online application form through the admissions portal.

documents.title: Academic Certificates & Transcripts
documents.description: Copies of 10th grade, 12th grade (high school leaving certificate), and degree transcripts for postgraduate applicants.

documents.title: Valid Passport
documents.description: A copy of your passport (all pages), valid for at least 18 months beyond your intended start date.

documents.title: English Language Proficiency
documents.description: IELTS (6.0 or above), TOEFL (80 or above), or equivalent proof of English proficiency.

documents.title: Statement of Purpose (SOP)
documents.description: A 500–800 word essay outlining your academic background, reasons for choosing the programme, and career goals.

documents.title: Reference Letters
documents.description: Two academic reference letters on official institutional letterhead.

documents.title: Curriculum Vitae / Resume
documents.description: Required for postgraduate and doctoral applicants, detailing your academic and professional background.

documents.title: Research Proposal (Doctoral Applicants)
documents.description: A detailed research proposal of approximately 1,500–2,000 words outlining your intended research area.

documents.title: Portfolio (Design Programmes)
documents.description: A portfolio showcasing your previous work, required for applicants to design-related programmes.

documents.title: Work Experience / Certifications
documents.description: Copies of any relevant professional certifications or work experience documents.

documents.title: Passport-sized Photographs
documents.description: Recent digital colour photographs with a white background.

documents.title: Migration / Transfer Certificate
documents.description: Certificate from your previous institution confirming your academic transfer.

importantNote.title: Important Note
importantNote.description: Original documents will be required for verification upon arrival. Do not send original documents by post prior to admission.

intakeSection.title: Application Intakes and Deadlines
intakeSection.description: Presidency University offers two main academic intakes each year. Choose the intake that best fits your academic plans and apply early to secure your place.

intakes.name: July / August Intake
intakes.details: The main academic intake begins in July/August. Applications typically open in January, with deadlines for international students between April and May.

intakes.name: January Intake
intakes.details: A limited number of programmes offer a January intake. Availability varies by course, so check programme-specific details before applying.

intakeSection.note: International students are strongly advised to apply at least 3–4 months in advance to allow time for document verification, admission processing, and student visa approval.

visaSection.title: Indian Student Visa Information
visaSection.description: International students typically require a Student Visa (S Visa) issued by the Indian High Commission or Embassy in their home country. Requirements may vary by nationality, so always confirm with your local embassy.

requirements.title: Valid Passport
requirements.desc: Must be valid for at least 18 months beyond your course end date

requirements.title: Offer Letter
requirements.desc: Official admission letter from Presidency University

requirements.title: Financial Proof
requirements.desc: Proof of funds for tuition and living expenses

requirements.title: Health Insurance
requirements.desc: Valid travel & health insurance in India

afterArrival.title: After Arrival in India
afterArrival.description: Students must register with the Foreigners Regional Registration Office (FRRO) within 14 days of arrival. The Office of International Affairs (OIA) will assist you throughout this process.

importantNotes: Visa rules and requirements may change. Always verify with the Indian Ministry of Home Affairs and your local embassy.
Student visas cannot be converted into employment visas within India. You must apply from your home country if you receive a job offer.

ctaSection.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
ctaSection.description: Apply now and take the first step toward studying at Presidency University. Our admissions team is here to support you at every stage.
